name: How much could I get if I win a copyright suit against Perplexity like NYT?
description: Up to $150K per work statutorily, plus profits.[1]

mainEntity.name: How much could I get if I win a copyright suit against Perplexity like NYT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Up to $150K per work statutorily, plus profits.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Statutory damages up to $150,000 per infringed work, plus profits disgorgement and attorney fees.[1] NYT seeks actual/statutory damages, injunctions.[1] Key factors: willfulness (up to $1M+ enhanced), registration timing (pre-infringement best).[1] Values vary by portfolio size; small creators cap at $30K unregistered. Pursue strategically for max recovery.
